title: astragalus subglaberrimus
intro: Astragalus subglaberrimus, also known as the Mongolian milkvetch, is a type of flowering plant in the legume family, Fabaceae. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, as well as its ability to boost the immune system and protect against oxidative stress. The health benefits of Astragalus subglaberrimus include its potential to reduce fatigue, improve cardiovascular health, and enhance the body's natural defenses against infections and diseases. Astragalus subglaberrimus can be prepared as a tea, capsule, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
